other_observers: Joe Roller, Glenn Walbek the first time that day. Later in the day saw it with Nick Komar, Brandon Percival, Glenn Walbek, Mark Peterson, and several others that I can't remember.; Glenn Walbek found the bird several days before my sighting, seen by several people
description: A very small bird with a long lengthy body. It had a short thick neck. The bill was generally pointed upward and it was a small gray bill. The body was fairly dark showing a little white patch on the lower flank. Most of the neck (front and back) was gray as was the head. The adult bird had a pretty much all gray neck and face, showing that it was molting from alternate to basic plumage.Behaviors: First found it flying around, then it landed and started swimming and diving, saw it several times during the dayCall: Didn’t hear itPlumage: 1 adult molting from alternate to basic
